{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|seo}}
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|infobox}}
<% if (it.descriptionText) { %>
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|description}}
<% } else { -%>
''To be written.''
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasProperties) { %>
== Effects ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|properties}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasTierWeights) { %>
== Tier Weights ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|tier_weights}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasVariants) { %>
== Variants ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|variants}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasRewards) { %>
== Rewards ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|rewards}}
<% } -%>

{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|categories}}
